commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a new Vite React marketing website under `website/` with Tailwind/Framer Motion UI, static brand assets, deployment config, a nested package/lockfile, and a full-page screenshot preview.

Reproducibility: not applicable. for the central feature because this is a new website, not a current-main bug. The deploy blocker is source-reproducible from the mismatch between `website/vercel.json` and the README's root-config instructions.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can align the Vercel config and README while leaving the website design and maintainer product decision intact.

target.title: feat(website): add macOS-themed marketing landing page
target.author: joevenner

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
